nameEn: IFIP International Information Security and Privacy Conference
description: An IFIP conference on information security and privacy, covering security governance, privacy policy, and security management across a broad spectrum. It serves as an international forum for security research exchange, particularly within the European community.

bestPapers.paperTitle: Post-Processing in Local Differential Privacy: An Extensive Evaluation and Benchmark Platform

descriptionKo: IFIP에서 주관하는 정보 보안 및 프라이버시 학회로, 보안 거버넌스, 프라이버시 정책, 보안 관리 등 폭넓은 주제를 다룬다. 유럽을 중심으로 국제적인 보안 연구 교류의 장 역할을 한다.
descriptionEn: An IFIP conference on information security and privacy, covering security governance, privacy policy, and security management across a broad spectrum. It serves as an international forum for security research exchange, particularly within the European community.
